description: Demonstrates the full ACP 7-layer semantic pipeline lifecycle with tipping points and safety valves.
semantic_description: User-submitted AI business request with natural language input. Demonstrates full 7-layer ACP semantic pipeline: grounding (L5 NL → L4 intent) → planning (L3 capability selection) → execution (L2 action → L1 tool → L0 DB). Tracks multi-dimensional execution context: cost (token + dollar), tool calls, duration, safety valve triggers, outcome.
lifecycle_description: DRAFT → SUBMITTED → GROUNDING → PLANNING → EXECUTING → COMPLETED (also EXECUTING/SUBMITTED → FAILED / BLOCKED / REJECTED)

description: Configurable safety rules that govern AI agent execution: approval gates, cost limits, rate limits, circuit breakers.
semantic_description: Configurable governance rule defining safety constraints for ACP execution: approval gates, cost limits, rate limits, content filters, scope restrictions, hallucination breakers, iteration limits. Each rule has trigger condition, action (pause/terminate/downgrade/log/require_approval), severity level, and evaluation priority.
lifecycle_description: ACTIVE ↔ INACTIVE (toggle only; trigger_count and last_triggered_at are stats, not state)

description: Records every step of the ACP pipeline execution with before/after snapshots, risk levels, and safety valve triggers.
semantic_description: Immutable audit trail of a single step in the ACP 7-layer semantic pipeline execution. Records layer (L5 NL ↔ L0 DB), action type (grounding/intent_parse/object_resolve/risk_evaluate/skill_select/plan_generate/tool_call/approval_check/cost_check/circuit_break/semantic_validate), before/after snapshots for state replay, duration, cost, risk level, safety valve trigger status, and reversibility metadata.
lifecycle_description: No status lifecycle — immutable transaction record. acs_log_status (success/failed/skipped/blocked) and acs_log_reversal_status are result markers, not state transitions.
